ground_truth.description: Photo of bar "Ankerklause" from outdoor seating in Maybachufer, Berlin. Neon sign with loopscript "Ankerklause" might give it away. Table with beer visible.
ground_truth.photographer_description: A photo of the bar «Ankerklause» taken from outdoor seating in Maybachufer, Berlin. A neon sign with loopscript that says «ankerklause» might give it away, but it might be challenging to recognize the letters. A table with a beer should make it obviously a bar, and with metadata of location, it might be able to get it. Otherwise, it would be impressive.

details.description: Nighttime street scene at an outdoor seating area in front of a small corner bar with a maritime theme. The façade features a bright blue cursive neon sign reading “Ankerklause” with an anchor symbol, a red‑and‑white striped awning, and warm interior lighting visible through large windows decorated with stickers and lights. Metal café chairs and wooden tables line the sidewalk; patrons are seated with beer glasses. A tabletop menu holder shows an anchor graphic and the word “Ahoi.” A bus stop sign is visible at the left edge, and passing traffic lights reflect in the windows. The overall atmosphere suggests a lively neighborhood bar beside a main road and near the canal embankment.

details.description: Nighttime street-cafe scene in Berlin featuring a small eatery with a bright blue neon sign that reads 'Ankerklause' above a red-and-white striped awning. Outdoor wooden tables are set with menus and glassware; two young men sit at the foreground table, one wearing a leather jacket and the other a green Florida sweatshirt, each with a beer in front of them. Inside and around the venue, warm interior lights and additional patrons are visible through large windows. The overall vibe is casual urban nightlife typical of Kreuzberg, with bicycles and other subtle street activity in the background.

details.description: A nighttime photograph taken at the outdoor terrace of the famous bar 'Ankerklause' in Berlin. The scene is dominated by a bright blue neon sign reading 'Ankerklause' in cursive script, accompanied by a stylized anchor symbol on the left. The building's facade features a red and white striped awning or overhang above the entrance, where the street number '104' is visible. In the foreground, two young men are seated at a dark wooden table; the man on the left wears a black leather jacket over a graphic t-shirt, while the man on the right wears a dark green sweatshirt with 'JACK & JONES FLORIDA' text. On the table, there are glasses of beer and a wooden menu holder displaying a logo with an anchor and the word 'Ahoi'. Background elements include other patrons seated inside and outside, warm string lights, and street traffic visible to the far left with car taillights and a bus stop sign.

details.description: A night photograph taken from the outdoor seating area of a bar named Ankerklause in Berlin. The most prominent feature is a bright blue neon sign on the roof that reads 'Ankerklause' next to an anchor symbol. The building features red and white striped awnings and a small sign with the house number '104'. Several people are seated at wooden tables in the foreground and background. In the background, a yellow 'H' sign indicates a nearby public transport stop, and streetlights illuminate the urban setting.

details.description: Nighttime street-side bar/restaurant with a nautical theme. A wooden outdoor seating area is occupied by patrons; a long wooden table holds drinks and a decorative box labeled “Ahoi” with an anchor motif. A blue neon sign runs vertically along the storefront, and the establishment features a red-and-white striped awning above large windows. Warm interior lighting and visible reflections suggest a lively, maritime-themed venue, likely in a harbor district. Several people are seated and conversing, while one person stands nearby in casual attire. The overall scene emphasizes casual waterfront hospitality and nautical decor.

details.description: A nighttime photograph, oriented vertically but depicting a horizontal scene, showing the outdoor seating area of a bar. The most prominent feature is a bright blue neon sign reading "Ankerklause" in cursive script, with a blue neon anchor symbol below it. The sign is mounted on a building facade featuring a red and white striped awning and string lights. The number "104" is visible on the wall, indicating the street address. In the foreground, seated at a wooden table, is a young man with blonde hair wearing a black leather jacket and a white graphic t-shirt, looking towards the camera. Beside him, partially visible, is another person wearing a dark green sweatshirt with "JACK & JONES FLORIDA" text. On the wooden table, there is a menu or folder with the word "Ahoi" and a graphic, along with beer glasses. The background shows the interior of the establishment through large windows and other patrons seated outside. The lighting is a mix of the blue neon glow and warm artificial lights from the bar.

details.description: A night photograph taken at an outdoor seating area of a bar. A prominent blue neon sign reads 'Ankerklause' with an anchor symbol, positioned above a red and white striped awning. Several people are seated at dark wooden tables; one person wears a green sweatshirt with 'JACK & JONES FLORIDA' text, and another is in a black leather jacket. On the table, there is a brown menu or folder with the word 'Ahoi' and an anchor illustration, alongside glasses of beer, one of which has the 'VELTINS' logo. In the background, urban streetlights and a yellow 'H' sign (indicating a German bus or tram stop) are visible. The building number '104' is seen near the entrance.
